context: Tests whether the agent generates gift card codes in the correct XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX format using a safe character set (no ambiguous characters), uses cryptographically secure randomness, wraps issuance in a database transaction, sends a properly-structured email after issuance, and stores monetary values in integer cents.

checklist.name: Code format: 4×4 groups
checklist.description: Generated codes follow the pattern XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX — exactly 4 alphanumeric groups of 4 characters separated by hyphens (16 chars + 3 hyphens = 19 total characters)

checklist.name: No ambiguous characters
checklist.description: The character set used for code generation does NOT include the characters '0' (zero), 'O' (letter O), '1' (one), or 'I' (letter I)

checklist.name: Cryptographic randomness
checklist.description: Uses Node.js crypto.randomBytes() (or equivalent cryptographically secure source) for generating random bytes — NOT Math.random()

checklist.name: Atomic issuance transaction
checklist.description: The gift card row and the initial transaction row are inserted inside a single database transaction (so both succeed or both fail together)

checklist.name: Initial 'issue' transaction
checklist.description: An 'issue' type transaction row is inserted into the transactions ledger table when the card is created, with amount equal to the card's initial value

checklist.name: Amounts in integer cents
checklist.description: Monetary values are stored and passed as integers representing cents (e.g. 5000 for $50.00), not as decimal numbers

checklist.name: Email sent after issuance
checklist.description: An email is sent to the card recipient (issued_to address) after the card is successfully created

checklist.name: Email includes code
checklist.description: The email payload includes the gift card code field

checklist.name: Email includes formatted value
checklist.description: The email payload includes a human-readable formatted monetary value (e.g. '$50.00'), not just the raw cents integer

checklist.name: Email includes expiresAt
checklist.description: The email payload includes an expiry date field, with a fallback string value of 'Never' when the card has no expiry

checklist.name: Email includes shopUrl
checklist.description: The email payload includes a shop URL field for the recipient to use the card
